---
title: "Portfolio Dashboard"
subtitle: "Personal investment portfolio tracker built with R & Quarto"
categories: [R, Finance, Quarto, tidyquant]
date: 2026-04-25
---

## Overview

An interactive portfolio dashboard built entirely in R and Quarto, pulling real-time stock data via `tidyquant` and Yahoo Finance.

The dashboard tracks 9 positions across US equities, ETFs, and commodities — with key metrics updated automatically at each render.

## Key metrics

-   **Portfolio value** and number of positions
-   **Sharpe ratio** — risk-adjusted performance
-   **Performance** over 1 month, 6 months, 1 year, and 5 years
-   **Per-stock details** — PE ratio, dividend yield, current price

## Live dashboard

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://flipr-data.github.io/portfolio-dashboard/dashboard.html"
        width="100%" 
        height="800px" 
        style="border: 0.5px solid #D3D1C7; border-radius: 12px;">
</iframe>
```

## Tech stack

-   `tidyquant` — stock data from Yahoo Finance
-   `quantmod` — financial data manipulation
-   `ggplot2` — price evolution charts
-   `Quarto` dashboard layout

## Source code

Full code available on [GitHub](https://github.com/FlipR-data/portfolio-dashboard).
